# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

envoy:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_0
      address:
        socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 80 }
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - { name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager, typed_config: { "@type": "type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager", route_config: { name: local_route, virtual_hosts: [{ name: local_service, domains: ["*"], routes: [{ match: { prefix: "/" }, route: { cluster: backend } }] }] } } } }
  clusters:
    - name: backend
      connect_timeout: 0.25s
      type: STATIC
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: backend
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 80 }
    - name: retry_policy
      connect_timeout: 0.25s
      type: STATIC
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: retry_policy
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 80 }
  routers:
    - name: local_route
      route:
        cluster: backend
  stats_sinks:
    - name: envoy.stat_sinks.file_per_thread
      typed_config: { "@type": "type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.metrics.v2.FilePerThreadStatsConfig", path: "/var/log/envoy/stats.log" }
  listeners:
    - name: listener_0
      address:
        socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 80 }
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - { name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager, typed_config: { "@type": "type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager", route_config: { name: local_route, virtual_hosts: [{ name: local_service, domains: ["*"], routes: [{ match: { prefix: "/" }, route: { cluster: backend } }] }] } } } }
  clusters:
    - name: backend
      connect_timeout: 0.25s
      type: STATIC
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: backend

              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 80 }
  routers:

  stats_sinks:
